en: As for the divisions of the gatekeepers: of the Korahites, Meshelemiah the son of Kore, of the sons of Asaph.
zh: 守門的人的班次如下：可拉家族，亞薩的子孫中，有可利的兒子米施利米雅。

en: And Meshelemiah had sons: Zechariah the firstborn, Jediael the second, Zebadiah the third, Jathniel the fourth,
zh: 米施利米雅有幾個兒子：長子是撒迦利雅、次子是耶疊、三子是西巴弟雅、四子是耶提聶、

en: Elam the fifth, Jehohanan the sixth, Eliehoenai the seventh.
zh: 五子是以攔、六子是約哈難、七子是以利約乃。

en: And Obed-edom had sons: Shemaiah the firstborn, Jehozabad the second, Joah the third, Sachar the fourth, Nethanel the fifth,
zh: 俄別．以東有幾個兒子：長子是示瑪雅、次子是約薩拔、三子是約亞，四子是沙甲、五子是拿坦業、

en: Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Peullethai the eighth, for God blessed him.
zh: 六子是亞米利、七子是以薩迦、八子是毘烏利太； 神實在賜福給俄別．以東。

en: Also to his son Shemaiah were sons born who were rulers in their fathers' houses, for they were men of great ability.
zh: 他的兒子示瑪雅也生了幾個兒子，都是管治他們的家族的，因為他們都是英勇的戰士。

en: The sons of Shemaiah: Othni, Rephael, Obed and Elzabad, whose brothers were able men, Elihu and Semachiah.
zh: 示瑪雅的兒子是俄得尼、利法益、俄備得和以利薩巴。以利薩巴的兄弟以利戶和西瑪迦都是勇士。

en: All these were of the sons of Obed-edom with their sons and brothers, able men qualified for the service; sixty-two of Obed-edom.
zh: 這些人都是俄別．以東的子孫，他們和他們的兒子、兄弟，都是有能力辦事的人。俄別．以東的子孫，共有六十二人。

en: And Meshelemiah had sons and brothers, able men, eighteen.
zh: 米施利米雅有兒子和兄弟，都是勇士，共十八人。

en: And Hosah, of the sons of Merari, had sons: Shimri the chief (for though he was not the firstborn, his father made him chief),
zh: 米拉利的子孫何薩有幾個兒子，長子是申利 、

en: Hilkiah the second, Tebaliah the third, Zechariah the fourth: all the sons and brothers of Hosah were thirteen.
zh: 次子是希勒家、三子是底巴利雅、四子是撒迦利亞。何薩所有的兒子和兄弟共十三人。

en: These divisions of the gatekeepers, corresponding to their chief men, had duties, just as their brothers did, ministering in the house of the LORD.
zh: 以上這些都是守門人的班次；無論是首領或是他們的親族，都在耶和華的殿裡按班供職。

en: And they cast lots by fathers' houses, small and great alike, for their gates.
zh: 他們無論大小，都按著他們的家族抽籤，看守各門。

en: The lot for the east fell to Shelemiah. They cast lots also for his son Zechariah, a shrewd counselor, and his lot came out for the north.
zh: 抽出守東門的籤的是示利米雅。他的兒子撒迦利亞是個聰明的謀士，他們為他抽出了守北面的籤。

en: Obed-edom's came out for the south, and to his sons was allotted the gatehouse.
zh: 俄別．以東守南門；他的兒子守庫房。

en: For Shuppim and Hosah it came out for the west, at the gate of Shallecheth on the road that goes up. Watch corresponded to watch.
zh: 書聘和何薩守西門，以及在斜路上的沙利基門；守衛的人相對而立。

en: On the east there were six each day, on the north four each day, on the south four each day, as well as two and two at the gatehouse.
zh: 守東門的有六個利未人，守北門的每日有四人，守南門的每日有四人，守庫房的兩人一組。

en: And for the colonnade on the west there were four at the road and two at the colonnade.
zh: 在西面的前廊有四人在大路上，在前廊那裡有兩個人。

en: These were the divisions of the gatekeepers among the Korahites and the sons of Merari.
zh: 以上這些人是可拉子孫和米拉利子孫守門的人的班次。

en: And of the Levites, Ahijah had charge of the treasuries of the house of God and the treasuries of the dedicated gifts.
zh: 他們其他的利未親族，就管理神殿裡的庫房和聖物的庫房。

en: The sons of Ladan, the sons of the Gershonites belonging to Ladan, the heads of the fathers' houses belonging to Ladan the Gershonite: Jehieli.
zh: 革順家族拉但的子孫中作首領的，有革順家族拉但的子孫耶希伊利。

en: The sons of Jehieli, Zetham, and Joel his brother, were in charge of the treasuries of the house of the LORD.
zh: 耶希伊利的兒子西坦和他的兄弟約珥，掌管耶和華殿裡的庫房。

en: Of the Amramites, the Izharites, the Hebronites, and the Uzzielites-
zh: 至於暗蘭家族、以斯哈家族、希伯倫家族和烏薛家族，也各有職守。

en: and Shebuel the son of Gershom, son of Moses, was chief officer in charge of the treasuries.
zh: 摩西的孫子、革順的兒子細布業作庫房的總管。

en: His brothers: from Eliezer were his son Rehabiah, and his son Jeshaiah, and his son Joram, and his son Zichri, and his son Shelomoth.
zh: 細布業的兄弟是以利以謝；以利以謝的兒子是利哈比雅，利哈比雅的兒子是耶篩亞，耶篩亞的兒子是約蘭，約蘭的兒子是細基利，細基利的兒子是示羅密。

en: This Shelomoth and his brothers were in charge of all the treasuries of the dedicated gifts that David the king and the heads of the fathers' houses and the officers of the thousands and the hundreds and the commanders of the army had dedicated.
zh: 這示羅密和他的兄弟掌管庫房裡的一切聖物，就是大衛王、眾家族首領、千夫長、百夫長和軍長所獻的聖物。

en: From spoil won in battles they dedicated gifts for the maintenance of the house of the LORD.
zh: 他們把在戰場上掠奪的財物獻上，用作修建耶和華的殿。

en: Also all that Samuel the seer and Saul the son of Kish and Abner the son of Ner and Joab the son of Zeruiah had dedicated- all dedicated gifts were in the care of Shelomoth and his brothers.
zh: 撒母耳先見、基士的兒子掃羅、尼珥的兒子押尼珥和洗魯雅的兒子約押所分別為聖的一切，以及一切分別為聖的物，都歸示羅密和他的眾兄弟掌管。

en: Of the Izharites, Chenaniah and his sons were appointed to external duties for Israel, as officers and judges.
zh: 以斯哈家族有基拿尼雅和他的眾子在聖殿外作官長和審判官，治理以色列人。

en: Of the Hebronites, Hashabiah and his brothers, 1,700 men of ability, had the oversight of Israel westward of the Jordan for all the work of the LORD and for the service of the king.
zh: 希伯倫家族有哈沙比雅和他的親族，共一千七百人，都是勇士，主管約旦河西以色列地耶和華的一切職事和王的任務。

en: Of the Hebronites, Jerijah was chief of the Hebronites of whatever genealogy or fathers' houses. (In the fortieth year of David's reign search was made and men of great ability among them were found at Jazer in Gilead.)
zh: 希伯倫家族中有作首領的耶利雅，是按著他們家族的族譜作希伯倫家族的首領的。大衛在位第四十年，經過調查，在基列的雅謝從這家族中找到英勇的戰士。

en: King David appointed him and his brothers, 2,700 men of ability, heads of fathers' houses, to have the oversight of the Reubenites, the Gadites and the half-tribe of the Manassites for everything pertaining to God and for the affairs of the king.
zh: 耶利雅的親族有二千七百人，都是勇士，各家族的首領；大衛王派他們管理流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派一切有關 神和王的事務。
